steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task has no unmet dependencies (task.json declares no dependencies).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Initialize mandatory task folder structure including assets/paper/.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review the existing paper corpus (currently empty) and write research/research_papers.md establishing baseline.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Search the internet for >=10 relevant papers across granularity conditioning, hierarchical decomposition, calibration, and the four roadmap benchmarks; populate Discovered Papers section.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review prior project code/assets (only t0001 brainstorming) for any reusable findings.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Synthesize research outputs into plan/plan.md describing implementation: paper-asset creation and synthesis writing.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: No remote compute needed for a literature survey.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Spawn /add-paper subagents for >=10 discovered papers, producing properly structured paper assets.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Out-of-scope for a literature survey task type.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json synthesizing the survey findings.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Survey itself produces no quantitative metrics to compare against literature.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions for Phase 2 baseline experiment design and benchmark choices.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task complete.
